channel.title: OpenShield Blog
channel.description: Enterprise-Grade Open Source CSPM Project Updates

item.title: Why We Built OpenShield: Solving the Cloud Security Accessibility Gap
item.description: Cloud security shouldn't be a luxury reserved for the Fortune 500. We're democratizing CSPM for startups and researchers.
item.author: OpenShield Maintainers

item.title: Under the Hood: Engineering a Dynamic Rule Orchestration Engine
item.description: A technical deep-dive into how OpenShield uses Python dynamic imports and SDK abstraction to scale security coverage.
item.author: OpenShield Engineering

item.title: Automating Microsoft Sentinel with OpenShield Findings
item.description: Learn how to feed OpenShield's security posture data directly into Azure's enterprise SIEM for unified visibility.
item.author: OpenShield Engineering
